title: KMS with Intel Graphic fails

patch:
commit 54cd2622a50c26fdd0b1ff024263766b1f77ba4f
Author: Daniel Walker <dwalker@fifo99.com>
Date:   Wed Jul 15 08:52:42 2009 -0700

    gpu: drm: drm_gem: Add a NULL check from kzalloc in drm_gem_object_alloc
    
    kzalloc can output NULL, so I've added a check to make sure it's not NULL
    before we dereference it.
    
    Signed-off-by: Daniel Walker <dwalker@fifo99.com>

diff --git a/drivers/gpu/drm/drm_gem.c b/drivers/gpu/drm/drm_gem.c
index 8104eca..c911d6b 100644
--- a/drivers/gpu/drm/drm_gem.c
+++ b/drivers/gpu/drm/drm_gem.c
@@ -134,6 +134,8 @@ drm_gem_object_alloc(struct drm_device *dev, size_t size)
 	BUG_ON((size & (PAGE_SIZE - 1)) != 0);
 
 	obj = kzalloc(sizeof(*obj), GFP_KERNEL);
+	if (!obj)
+		return NULL;
 
 	obj->dev = dev;
 	obj->filp = shmem_file_setup("drm mm object", size, VM_NORESERVE);
